headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Henry Schein, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Elizabeth Anderson   maintains Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $100 to $90.

raw.headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Henry Schein, Lowers Price Target to $90
raw.summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Elizabeth Anderson   maintains Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $100 to $90.

headline: Henry Schein to Reduce Size of the Board of Directors following 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
summary: MELVILLE, N.Y., April 08, 2026--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world’s largest provider of healthcare solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, today announced its plan to reduce the size of its Board of Directors following its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 21, 2026.
